view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a primary admission path with secondary paths active is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a primary admission path with secondary paths active is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence demonstrates that the system allows for both queue and online bookings under a single offer version, fulfilling the requirement for a primary admission path while keeping secondary paths active. This is supported by the successful bookings from both customer one and customer two, as well as the linked use case which explicitly states the need for multiple admission paths. The prior steps confirm that the offer was created and published correctly, further validating the requirement's fulfillment.
